We take a look at Ronaldinho, one of the world's most exciting footballers in this retrospective from 2009.
World War One, also known as the Great War, started in 1914 after the assassination of Archduke Franz Ferdinand of Austria; his murder catapulted a war across Europe that lasted until 1918.
Relationships come under the spotlight at the Damson Dene as Nadine and Christian try to repair their marriage; Bob and Jeanie celebrate their 50th year together. S1 E7
After the evacuation at Dunkirk, Britain had lost not only men, but also heavy weaponry, warships, and aircraft. Britain alone faced Germany across many fronts, including Rommel in North Africa. E2
1944 would be a disastrous year for German forces in the East - as the Soviet army went on the offensive and a second front opened, weary German troops were forced to retreat to Berlin. E2
We explore all the major battles of the Second World War, from the early defeats in Norway and France to the military successes at El Alamein and Tunisia and the surrender of the Nazis in 1945.
Examining the history of war tactics. We explore how blockades have the ability to destroy or at least damage a country's ability to wage war. S1 E6: Blockade
As Britain began to strike Nazi Germany, it was soon suffering losses from hi-tech air defences; in 1941, British paratroops were sent to seize a German radar system which needed to be cracked.

programmes.show_name: Idi Amin Terror: Where Were You?
programmes.show_description: The brutal reign of one of the 20th century's most notorious and bloodiest dictators, Idi Amin, began in 1971 when he seized control beginning a reign of torture, terror and murder of 300,000 people.
We explore the overlap between naval crafts and aircraft in a number of wars and how aircraft carriers played a pivotal role by bridging the mobility of planes with the buoyant fortresses of the sea.
Adolf Hitler loved cars. But it was travelling by car through crowds, which could easily harbor assassins that he was at his most vulnerable - and his bodyguard at their most alert. Ep 8
As the greatest loss of warships in history and the last casualties of WWI, the sinking at Scapa Flow was a monumental decision with consequences for European history that still reverberate today.
Les Mallow wants Jack to help him expose a scandal and help to secure him a place on the council; he is prepared to use any means to secure Jack's help. S2 E5: Some Bulbs to Keep the Garden Bright
The Winchester Club is faced with permanent closure when one of Arthur's money-making schemes backfires badly, but Ray has an idea, a charity football match. S9 E9: Last Orders at the Winchester
Francis secures a lenient sentence for a smuggler, but Ross suspects an informer; elsewhere, Elizabeth admits feelings for Ross while Warleggan gains power. S2 E5
Armed robberies lead the CID unit to prison, to escort safe-cracker Dickie Fingers for interview. They are set upon by a gang determined to get their hands on Fingers. Starring John Simm. S2 E2
Alf's joy at Rita's pending divorce is short lived when he learns she is to live with the new doctor. S3 E1
With Tina Turner, Gerry Rafferty and Justin Hayward. The legendary BAFTA-winning music and comedy show from Thames TV (1979). All in the best possible taste!
Simon goes to help a young American woman who is being overcharged by a taxi driver in Rome - and becomes involved in a kidnapping case with dramatic developments. S1 E2: The Latin Touch

After Lindbergh's fame, his baby was kidnapped in 1932. Carpenter Hauptmann was executed, but mysteries remain. Narrated by Robert Powell.
Fierce internal feuding between the Abwehr, the Gestapo and the Reich Central Security Office may have contributed to the Nazis' defeat in WW2. E1: German Intelligence in WW2
The Waffen-SS were renowned for their brutality and tenacity, characteristics which made them the subject of numerous Allied war crime investigations. Ep1: Waffen-SS
The mighty Flying Fortress takes to the air as we examine the background and development of one of the most iconic bombers from WWII. Serving with both the USAAF and the RAF. S2 E1
The course of WWII changed dramatically when the USA joined the Allies. In the Pacific, American sea power tackled the German U-Boats. In the East, the Red Army pushed the Germans back to Berlin. E3
Tim Pigott-Smith narrates the story of the Soviet victory over the mighty Japanese Kwangtung Army in the mountains of Manchuria, which is one of the least known of the Second World War.
Examining the history of war tactics. We explore siege warfare, which is almost as old as history itself and can have several aims. S1 E7
The role of naval crafts and aircraft in WW2 with eyewitness accounts about how campaigns were planned and what happened on the day of attack when protection from the enemy was very limited.
We explore the evolution of the main battle tank - charting its progress from the fields of WWI France to the deserts of Iraq - and check out its arch-rival of 'tank killer weapons'. E1: Heavy Metal

Col. Tim Collins reinvestigates one of the most celebrated campaigns of WWII - the war in North Africa - looking at the Siege of Tobruk and the Battle of El Alamein. Ep1: Tobruk - Triumph and Disaster
We look at three different German U-boat wrecks from WWII including UC-66 - the first to be sunk by a plane - and U-480, the world's first stealth sub. Ep1: Assassins of the Deep
Tom meets a rich lady who is looking for her father and agrees to help; meanwhile, Billy starts work as a doctor at a local surgery in Wellesley Street. S2 E6: God & Love & Wellesley Street
Since he can't sell his second hand cars, Arthur decides it might be a good idea to hire them out instead - but Ray has some trouble with the customers. S9 E10: Cars and Pints and Pains
Ross tries to financially support Elizabeth in the wake of Francis's death, but George calls in Ross's debt; meanwhile, Demelza toils loyally to protect all at Nampara. Starring Aidan Turner. S2 E6
Drama series about a cop who wakes up in what seems to be 1973. After a bomb warning, A-Division go on red alert, but it doesn't fit with Sam's understanding of IRA methods. Starring John Simm. S2 E3
